Hero.subtitle: Sie zahlen wahrscheinlich 30-60% zu viel. Wir verhandeln mit über 10 erstklassigen Zahlungsabwicklern, um dauerhafte Einsparungen zu sichern – umsonst.

Process.subtitle: Wir übernehmen die Prüfung, Verhandlung und Migration Ihres Zahlungssystems. Sie überprüfen die Zahlen und entscheiden.
Process.step1Body: Sie laden Ihre Händlerabrechnung sicher hoch. Unsere Analysten zerlegen diese Zeile für Zeile, um wahre Interchange-Kosten aufzudecken.
Process.step2Body: Wir legen Ihre anonymisierten Parameter unserem Netzwerk von über 10 Premium-Anbietern vor, damit diese um Sie konkurrieren.
Process.step3Body: Sie erhalten einen detaillierten Audit-Bericht. Wir zeigen, was Sie jetzt zahlen, zahlen sollten, und die besten Gebote.
Process.step4Body: Wir verwalten den gesamten Migrationsprozess inklusive neu programmierter Terminals und POS-Integration ohne Ausfallzeit.
Process.ctaSubtitle: Laden Sie Ihre Abrechnung hoch, und erhalten Sie morgen Gebote. Das Audit ist komplett kostenlos.

AboutUs.subtitle: We spent decades building payment infrastructure for universities and managing high-stakes merchant accounts for enterprises. We saw exactly where the money went — and where it didn't have to. Then we decided to put that knowledge to work for you.
AboutUs.probSubtitle: In unnecessary payment processing fees are paid by US merchants every year — most of them without ever knowing.
AboutUs.probBody1: The payment processing industry is intentionally complex. Tiered pricing, junk fees, regulatory markups, PCI surcharges — the model is designed to obscure the true cost of accepting a card.
AboutUs.probBody2: Large enterprises employ internal compliance teams and payment operations staff to fight this. Small and mid-size businesses don't. That's the gap we exist to close.
AboutUs.probBody3: FinTech 5 brings enterprise-grade payment expertise to every business we work with — at zero cost to the merchant.
AboutUs.h1Body: We spent decades building and managing payment infrastructure for universities, healthcare systems, and mid-market enterprises — seeing exactly how the money moved and where it was wasted.
AboutUs.h2Body: When flat-rate aggregators promised simplicity, we watched the fine print. Convenience disguised cost. Each transaction, each batch, each 'service fee' added up. The merchants who needed help most got it least.
AboutUs.h3Body: Taking the institutional knowledge we'd built over decades and deploying it exclusively for merchants — we launched FinTech 5 with one rule: zero consulting fees, ever.
AboutUs.h4Title: Serving merchants across NY, NJ and beyond
AboutUs.h4Body: Our network of 10+ tier-1 processor partners now competes for every client we represent. The expertise that once only Fortune 500 companies could access is now available to any serious business.
AboutUs.ruleSubtitle: The entire FinTech 5 model is built around these principles. They aren't values on a poster — they're the terms under which we operate.
AboutUs.r1Body: Every FinTech 5 client gets a named account representative. Not a ticket system or a chatbot — a real person who knows your account and picks up when you call.
AboutUs.r2Title: We Represent You, Not the Processor
AboutUs.r2Body: We're not owned by any processing company. We have no quota to fill for any particular partner. Our only obligation is to the merchant sitting across from us.
AboutUs.r3Body: When you select a processor through FT5, that processor compensates us — not you. Our consulting is free to merchants, full stop. No retainers, no consulting fees, no hidden charges.
AboutUs.r4Title: We Stay With You After the Switch
AboutUs.r4Body: The relationship doesn't end at signing. We review your statements, catch rate creep, escalate billing disputes, and re-bid your account if a better option emerges.
AboutUs.faqTitle: What merchants ask before working with us.
AboutUs.q1: How do you make money if you don't charge merchants?
AboutUs.a1: The processor we place you with compensates us from their existing margin. Our incentive aligns with yours: we only receive compensation if we find you a deal that genuinely benefits you.
AboutUs.q2: What size businesses do you work with?
AboutUs.a2: We work with merchants processing from $10,000 to several million per month. Our sweet spot is $30k–$500k, but there is no ceiling and no minimum to get started.
AboutUs.a3: We have established relationships with 10+ tier-1 processors including some of the largest acquiring banks and payment networks in the United States. We never steer you toward any single partner.
AboutUs.a4: You get a dedicated account rep. We monitor your statements monthly, flag any rate creep, handle disputes, and renegotiate on your behalf when better options emerge. The relationship doesn't end at the signature.
AboutUs.g2: No consulting fees charged to merchants, ever
AboutUs.g3: No pressure to switch if your current rate is competitive
AboutUs.g4: No ownership stake in any processor partner
AboutUs.g5: Full transparency on every fee, every month

Security.subtitle: We know that asking for a merchant statement is asking for immense trust. Here is exactly how we securely ingest, analyze, and protect your processing volume data.
Security.p1Body: All statements uploaded via our secure portal are encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 and encrypted at rest utilizing AES-256 bit encryption on enterprise-grade AWS infrastructure.
Security.p2Body: Our internal ingestion tools are designed to look for pricing tables, transaction volume, and fee markup. We do not store full primary account numbers (PAN) or customer DDA bank routing details found on some localized statements.
Security.p3Body: We use your statements strictly to perform the rate audit. Once the competitive bidding process concludes and a pricing model is locked in (or you choose not to proceed), raw statement PDFs are purged from our active processing servers.
Security.p4Body: For enterprise clients, government contractors, and healthcare organizations (HIPAA), we are ready to sign a Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement prior to the exchange of any financial documentation.
Security.btmTitle1: We don't sell your data. Every bid is blind.
Security.btmSubtitle: When we run a competitive bid across our 10+ processor network, we anonymize your business entity. Processors see your industry, volume, and current hardware setup — but your business name and contact info are stripped out until you explicitly choose a winning bid. They bid on your volume, not your name.

Solutions.subtitle: From free hardware placement to transparent interchange-plus pricing — each solution is designed to reduce your cost, not just move it around.
Solutions.prcTitle: We don't push you toward a product. We find what actually fits.
Solutions.pr1Body: We review your existing processor, pricing model, hardware, and effective rate. Most merchants don't know what they're actually paying.
Solutions.pr2Body: Do you need mobile capability? Are you primarily card-present or CNP? Do you want free hardware? We build a requirements picture before recommending anything.
Solutions.pr3Body: We recommend the combination of solution(s) that lowers your total cost, fits your workflow, and gives you room to grow — with the processor bids to back it up.
Solutions.btmTitle: We'll figure it out together — in one call.
Solutions.btmBody: Submit your statement or just your contact info. We'll map out the right solution stack and return your savings analysis within 24 hours or less.

Blog.title: The FT5 Playbook
Blog.subtitle: No jargon. No fluff. Expert breakdowns of payment processing written by people who spent decades inside the industry.
Blog.ctaTitle: Not ready for a full audit?
Blog.ctaSub: Download our 2026 Interchange Cheat Sheet to see exactly what Visa & Mastercard actually charge.
Blog.tTitle: Topics that matter to your bottom line.
Blog.c1Desc: Plain-English explanations of interchange, pricing models, and how the payment stack actually works.
Blog.c2Desc: Breakdowns of flat-rate vs tiered vs IC+ pricing — with real math on what each model costs at scale.
Blog.c3Desc: Deep dives into industry trends, seasonal rate changes, and what merchants should watch for in their statements.
Blog.c4Desc: Coverage of emerging payment tech: contactless, biometrics, AI fraud detection, and what's coming next.
Blog.tl1Desc: Enter your monthly volume and transaction details to see your estimated effective rate, markup breakdown, and potential savings — instantly.
Blog.tl2Desc: Upload your merchant statement and get a full line-by-line analysis with competitive bids from 10+ processors same day or less. No consulting fee. Ever.
Blog.whTitle: Written by people who spent decades inside the industry.
Blog.whSub: These aren't AI-generated summaries of press releases. This is the real operational knowledge our team accumulated from working inside acquiring banks, building processor networks, and negotiating on behalf of thousands of merchants.
Blog.l1: We name the things processors prefer to obscure — like tiered pricing tiers, basis point markups, and junk fees.
Blog.l2: We do the math for you. Every article includes real examples with actual numbers, not hypotheticals.
Blog.l3: We don't have editorial partnerships with processors. No sponsored content. No affiliate links. No agenda.
Blog.l4: Every piece of content is free, always. Our business model is consulting — not selling your data or your attention.
